topic: How to improve sk-interface-design and mcp-magicpath toward Claude Design parity

noveltyJustification: First pass; full current-state map and the judgment-vs-canvas split are all new to this lineage

ruledOut.approach: Independently re-deriving Claude Design feature set
ruledOut.reason: Out of scope per spec section 3; rely on seeded capability summary

ruledOut.approach: Treating the two skills as a single merge target
ruledOut.reason: Clean depends_on boundary; recommendations stay per-skill

focus: Input side: design-system inheritance (dim 1) + context grounding (dim 3)
noveltyJustification: New endorsed-but-absent inheritance insight and theme consume-parity finding reframe two of five gaps

ruledOut.approach: Generate and push themes back to the MagicPath account
ruledOut.reason: No create-theme in the documented CLI surface; platform scope creep

ruledOut.approach: Build a file/attachment upload-and-storage pipeline in either skill
ruledOut.reason: Runtime already supplies file paths/images; skill only needs to use them

focus: Iteration / visual feedback (dim 2): canvas + inline-comment loop + fidelity verification
noveltyJustification: Missing-protocol-not-missing-parts reframing (F16) plus fidelity-verification ADOPT change the priority calculus of the whole recommendation

ruledOut.approach: Hosted canvas with live inline-comment threads in either CLI skill
ruledOut.reason: That is the Claude Design web product; out of scope per spec section 3

ruledOut.approach: Heavyweight visual-regression / diff engine for fidelity
ruledOut.reason: Screenshot + judgment compare already afforded by composed skills

focus: Output side: quality levers (dim 4) + output/handoff (dim 5) + consolidated negative knowledge
noveltyJustification: Token-export ADOPT for magicpath and the name-levers-but-never-presets guardrail are new and load-bearing for the output side

ruledOut.approach: Style presets / pick-a-vibe lever menu in sk-interface-design
ruledOut.reason: Reintroduces templated defaults; violates the skill core philosophy

ruledOut.approach: Figma / PDF / presentation multi-format export in mcp-magicpath
ruledOut.reason: Heavy integration, low leverage; code+token handoff suffices
Judgment skill; rendering belongs to sk-code/magicpath/chrome-devtools

focus: Synthesis-prep: parity scorecard + prioritized recommendation + cross-lineage hooks
noveltyJustification: Scorecard scoring, cross-skill P1-P3 prioritization, and cross-lineage divergence hooks are new decisions not in any single prior iteration
